name: studio-ux-v2-tri-scope-and-in-app-docs
title: Studio UX v2 — tri-scope sidebar, agent-scope picker, in-app setup docs

dependencies.name: studio-agent-model-picker
dependencies.reason: Reuses SettingsModal + credential-storage hook for provider key entry; AgentModelPicker popover pattern is extended by the new AgentScopePicker.

dependencies.name: studio-update-notifications
dependencies.reason: updateCount chip renders per tri-scope section; OWN is almost always 0, INSTALLED + GLOBAL carry the real counts — requires 0683 outdated-per-origin plumbing to be generalized from {source, installed} to {own, installed, global}.

in: Skill Studio logo click → navigates to studio home (hash route #/)
AgentScopePicker mounted above left sidebar, full-width 40px row, sticky header
Tri-scope sidebar (OWN / INSTALLED / GLOBAL) replacing current dual (OWN / INSTALLED) section model
SetupDrawer — 480px right-slide drawer with provider-specific inline setup content
Server-side scanner extension: global-scope skill scanning + symlink + install-method detection
Cross-platform path resolution (os.homedir() + path.join()), Windows compatibility
Symlink transparency — SkillInfo.isSymlink, symlinkTarget, installMethod surfaced in UI
Max/Pro compliant label wording on the Claude Code provider row (verified copy per research)
Shared-folder agent deduplication (e.g. .agents/) — aggregate row with consumer chip list
out: Migration of existing localStorage keys (defer to follow-up — keep 0683 keys as-is)
New i18n translations (English strings only; translation infra is a separate increment)
Remote-agent scopes — only filesystem-discoverable agents are in scope
Editing of GLOBAL skills in-place (read-only in this increment; copy-to-own is the escape hatch)
New skill-install actions (outside of what 0682 already ships)

risks.description: Global scanner performance — scanning ~/.claude/skills/ + agent dirs on every /api/skills hit could be slow on large home dirs.
risks.mitigation: Cache global-scan results for 10s (in-memory); invalidate on SSE event from fs-watcher (already exists for project scope).

risks.description: Windows path resolution for agents whose registry entry is POSIX-only (e.g. '~/.config/agents/skills').
risks.mitigation: Adapter in path-resolver.ts maps '.config/' → '%APPDATA%/agents/' on win32 and exposes the decision via AgentDefinition.resolvedGlobalSkillsDir. Unit-test all 3 platform branches.

risks.description: User confusion from tri-scope (thinking three sections = three copies of the same skill).
risks.mitigation: ADR-01 design: each scope answers a distinct question ('mine', 'this agent in this project', 'this agent globally'); detail panel shows scope pill; plan.md §3 visual direction enforces the distinction via typography + color.

risks.description: Compliance drift on Claude Code CLI label (Anthropic ToS changes).
risks.mitigation: Label copy lives in strings.ts keyed by provider; research-verified wording is the initial value; update requires only a string-file change, not component refactor.

risks.description: Symlink resolution cycles (A → B → A) hanging the scanner.
risks.mitigation: Bounded realpath() with a visited-set in the scanner; log + skip on cycle detection.
